title: World Region Map Poster System
description: Design maps and region posters that merge world navigation, landmark hierarchy, and collectible poster appeal in one package.

zh-CN.title: 世界区域地图海报系统
zh-CN.description: 围绕世界地图和区域地图做海报系统，既要能导航，也要像玩家愿意收藏的地区宣传图。
